task_completion.description: Access the new custom query form for time entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web page showing the 'New query' form specifically for Time Entries.
The text 'Monthly Billing View' entered into the 'Name' text field on the query creation form.

task_completion.description: Set the query visibility to public.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Visible' setting is set to 'to any users' or 'Public' (usually a radio button or checkbox).
The 'Group results by' dropdown has 'Project' selected.

task_completion.description: Select the required columns: Date, User, Activity, Issue, Comment, and Hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Selected Columns' list box contains Date, User, Activity, Issue, Comment(s), and Hours.

task_completion.description: Save the query and view the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Successful creation') and the final time entries view showing the applied 'Monthly Billing View' query with the correct grouping and columns.

integrity.description: Ensure no new time entries were created.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen filling out or submitting a 'New time entry' form at any point in the trajectory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Redmine web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the Redmine application, not API calls in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the final query page is genuinely rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools are open to manipulate the DOM to fake the query name or column headers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected query name is exactly 'Monthly Billing View'. Public visibility corresponds to the 'to any users' option in the Redmine UI (internally value 2). The 'Group results by' dropdown must be set to 'Project'. The selected columns must include Date, User, Activity, Issue, Comment(s), and Hours. The agent must strictly avoid creating any new time entries.
